nodes.label: Integration tests for slash command access control gating in gateway/run.py.
The gate must recognize plugin-registered slash commands, not just     built-in
When an agent is running, /restart from a non-admin must be denied.
Admins must still be able to run privileged commands like /restart     through
/status is intentionally pre-gate on the fast-path so users can     always see
If /hist resolves to canonical 'history' and history is in     user_allowed_com
Random non-command text like /xyzzy is not in the registry. The gate     must n
When Discord is gated and Telegram isn't, the same user_id on     Telegram must
